name: Grilled Tofu and Vegetable Brochettes
recipeIngredient: 1 Block Firm Tofu, cut into 3/4 inch cubes
1/3 lb Crimini or Shiitake Mushrooms, stems removed and chopped
1 Large Red Bell Pepper, stemmed, seeded, and cut into 1-inch squares
1 Med Red or Yellow Onion, peeled, cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. For the marinade, add scallions, garlic, and ginger to a food processor or blender and pulse until finely chopped. Alternatively, chop by hand.
2. In a small skillet, heat olive oil and stir-fry the scallion mixture for a minute or two.
3. Stir in soy sauce and sugar, bringing to a boil.
4. Turn off heat, cool slightly, then stir in toasted sesame oil and red chile flakes (if using).
5. Cool marinade and pour over tofu cubes. Marinade at least 1 hour up to 4 hours.
6. Soak bamboo skewers in water for at least 30 minutes.
7. Thread marinated tofu, mushrooms, peppers, and onion wedges onto skewers attractively.
8. Brush vegetables with leftover marinade.
9. Grill or broil until vegetables are crisp and tender.
10. Serve with Sesame Spinach.
Yield: 4-6 servings
